# Naman Srivastava Portfolio

This site is the personal portfolio of Naman Srivastava, a software developer focused on full-stack development, cloud architecture, machine learning, and DevOps.

## Site Links

- [Portfolio Home](https://namansrivastava.in/)
- [Interview Experiences](https://interview-exp-inky.vercel.app/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/naman-0804)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/naman1608)
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@naman_0804/)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0007-1557-9333)

## Guidance

AI agents may browse and summarize the public portfolio content to help users understand Naman Srivastava's projects, skills, experience, blogs, and contact information.
